# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-app
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true" # manage proxy injection per deployment
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: my-container
        image: my-image:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
